title: Learn AWS IAM in less than 10 minutes
summary: A YouTube tutorial explaining AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) fundamentals for beginners. It covers users, roles, policies, the principle of least privilege, and IAM Access Analyzer as a tool for determining required permissions. The video emphasizes common beginner mistakes like granting administrator access and storing credentials in code.
